title: Skills
subtitle: Browse and manage AI capabilities
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Skills cannot be loaded without an active Gateway.

detail.author: Author
detail.apiKeyDesc: The primary API key for this skill. Leave blank if not required or configured elsewhere.
detail.envNote: Note: Rows with empty keys will be automatically removed during save.

toast.failedFolderNotFound: Skills folder does not exist yet. Install a skill first.
toast.failedOpenActualFolder: Failed to open actual skill folder
toast.searchTimeoutError: Search timed out, check network. You can also search on ClawHub.ai, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installTimeoutError: Installation timed out, check network. You can also download the ZIP from ClawHub.ai and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.searchRateLimitError: Search rate limit exceeded. You can also search on ClawHub.ai, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installRateLimitError: Installation rate limit exceeded. You can also download the ZIP from ClawHub.ai and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.fetchTimeoutError: Fetching skills timed out, please check your network connection.
toast.fetchRateLimitError: Fetching skills rate limit exceeded, please try again later.
toast.noBatchEnableTargets: All visible skills are already enabled.
toast.noBatchDisableTargets: All visible skills are already disabled.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.installDialogSubtitle: Browse Explore by default, or enter keywords to search.
marketplace.securityNote: Click skill card to view its documentation and security information on ClawHub before installation.
marketplace.manualInstallHint: Network issues? You can always download skill ZIP archives from ClawHub.ai and extract them manually into "{{path}}".
marketplace.noResults: No skills found matching your search.
marketplace.emptyPrompt: Search for new skills to expand your capabilities.
marketplace.searchError: ClawHub search failed. Check your connection or installation.

mcp.title: MCP services
mcp.description: Manage MCP services ClawCorp can call; enable a service to expose its tools while keeping runtime controls and logs available.

dialog.subtitle: Configure connection settings for local or remote MCP services that ClawCorp can call.

validation.commandRequired: A stdio server requires a command
validation.urlRequired: A remote server requires a URL

empty.title: No MCP services configured
empty.description: Add a service to expose its tools, runtime controls, and logs here.

panels.toolsDescription: Inspect tool visibility and run one-off tool calls.
panels.logsDescription: Review recent runtime events and stderr for this service.

states.invalidJson: Tool arguments must be valid JSON
states.noTools: No tools discovered yet. Start or connect the runtime first, then refresh tools.
